title: GitLab.com SaaS Realm Labels and Tags
headings: GitLab.com SaaS Realm Labels and Tags
text:
GitLab.com SaaS Realm Labels and Tags

Infrastructure Standards - Sandbox Realm Documentation

Infrastructure Standards - Global Labels and Tags Standards

Infrastructure Standards - Policies

Infrastructure Standards - Tutorials

Infrastructure Standards - Helpdesk

We use the gl_ prefix for all labels and tags. All keys use underscores ( snake_case ). All values should use hyphens ( alpha-dash for slug’d values), however underscores are allowed.

See the list of global labels and tags that should be applied to each resource.

There are no labels and tags specific to this realm yet.
